title: azedarach sempervirens var. australasica
intro: Azedarach sempervirens var. australasica, also known as the Australian or New South Wales native white cedar, is a plant species in the Mahonia family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. It is used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, digestive problems, and skin conditions, offering benefits like relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
